eraseConfirm: Erase all saved data? This cannot be undone.
stats.softRestart.restart: You're back. {{total}} alcohol-free days so far.
money.setBudgetHint: Set a monthly budget in Settings to track savings.
analytics.moodCorrelation.title: Mood ↔ drink patterns
analytics.moodCorrelation.empty: No drinks logged in the window yet.
iconThemes.title: App icon
iconThemes.subtitle: Pick how Alchohalt appears on your home screen.
iconThemes.platformNote: Web users see the change after reinstalling the PWA. iOS / Android changes apply once native binary assets ship in a future release.
disclaimer: Your logs stay on your device. We can't read them. Not medical advice.
goals.title: Goals
history.title: History

welcome.title: Welcome to Alchohalt
welcome.description: A private space to log what you drink and notice what's changing.

privacy.title: Your data, your device
privacy.description: Nobody else, including us, can see what you log. Optional AI features (off by default) are the only thing that can change this — you control them in Settings → AI.

tracking.title: Log what you drink
tracking.description: Note the time, the type, why, and how it felt — only the parts you want to.

insights.title: What changes over time
insights.description: Patterns surface as you log — on your device. Optional AI Insights (off until you enable it) can write a reflection from an anonymized summary.

goals.title: Set a target if you want one
goals.description: Pick a daily limit or a streak length. You can change either anytime, or skip this entirely.

ready.title: Ready when you are
ready.description: Add your first entry whenever you'd like. Or just look around.

quickTips.title: A few notes
quickTips.tip1: Start small. You can change the goal later.
quickTips.tip2: The patterns you see are only as honest as the entries.
quickTips.tip3: Glance at the trends when you remember. There's no scoreboard.
quickTips.tip4: You can export everything anytime. It's yours.

marketing.tagline: No ads. No analytics. Trust receipt included.
marketing.moatLine: We cryptographically cannot read what you log.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Self-experiment view. None of this leaves your phone.

privacy.heading: Privacy & data
privacy.tagline: No ads. No analytics. Trust receipt included.
privacy.subtitle: Three places this gets controlled. Grouped here so it's one decision instead of three.

goalTemplates.heading: Templates
goalTemplates.subtitle: Start from a common shape. You can still customize everything.

cutToSeven.title: Cut to 7 drinks per week
cutToSeven.description: Reduce weekly total to seven standard drinks.

dryTilThursday.title: Dry-til-Thursday
dryTilThursday.description: Push the first drink later in the week.

halfMyUsual.title: Half my usual
halfMyUsual.description: Cut weekly intake to half of last month's average.

ninetyDayReset.title: 90-day reset
ninetyDayReset.description: A long alcohol-free stretch for a real reset.

maintenance.title: Maintenance: weekly check-in
maintenance.detail: Switch to a once-a-week pulse instead of a streak.

budget.title: Maintenance budget
budget.detail: Allow up to 4 standard drinks per week.

medicalDisclaimer.title: Important medical disclaimer
medicalDisclaimer.content: Alchohalt is a personal tracking tool and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. This app is not a substitute for professional medical care.
medicalDisclaimer.emergency: If you're in a medical emergency or need urgent help with substance use, contact emergency services or a healthcare professional right now. The Crisis tab has direct numbers.

privacy.title: Your privacy is protected
privacy.onDevice: Entries live in your phone's local storage. Nothing leaves the device on its own. If you turn on cloud backup, the file is sealed end-to-end with a key only your device knows — we hold the encrypted blob, not the contents. Opt-in AI features (off by default) are the only path that can change this; see Settings → AI for the full data flow.
privacy.dataControl: You have complete control over your data. You can export, import, or delete all information at any time from the Settings panel.

support.title: Support & feedback
support.description: We read your feedback ourselves. It shapes what gets built.

subscription.title: Subscription
subscription.coreFeatures: The core — logging, history, streaks, money saved, crisis resources — is free forever. Premium adds longer-view analytics, custom presets, and more.
subscription.cancellation: You can cancel anytime from your device's subscription settings. Nothing's lost when you downgrade.

openSource.title: Open source
openSource.description: Alchohalt is open source. You can read the code, suggest changes, or build your own version.
